title: G2PLUS 100M Beige Cotton Twine, 1.0MM Wrapping Bakers String, 3Ply Butchers Cord for DIY Gift Decorations and Handicrafts
features: 【Well Made, Lightweight Cotton String.】The cotton cord is made of high qualiy cotton, This cord is thick and sturdy yet flexible. It works really well to tie parcels. Strong enough not to snap, rough enough not to slip when tying.
【Sturdy but Soft Butchers Cooking String】A coton twine to use for cooking, backing and just general usage. Good for any kitchen tying needs ie herbs, trussing chicken etc. for your cooking needs.
【Sturdy and Thick Craft String】The cotton string has a great thickness to it. You can use the cord to hang some wall decor, decorate indoor planters for a natural look.
【String for Gardening Use】This cotton cord is nicely presented on a roll so it is easy to use. This string is great for securing tomatoes and flowers to the canes.

【Variously Used Cotton Thread】 The beige cotton string is perfect for all types of crafts and kitchen use too. Our customer use it to tie up holiday decorations, hang wall decorations, and tying a turkey and so on. it is safe to use with food or with any other tasks around the house.
description: Product Description 1.0mm cotton beige string twine 1.0mm cotton beige string twine Good quality cotton string twine, fantastic for crafts, scrapbooking, or crafts. and is totally suitable for the purpose for which you purchased it. The beige string is great for crafts and cooking and all sorts. You can use this string to tie cake boxes, pastry boxes and more. and also for using in the oven. The cotton beige string works really well to tie parcels. Strong enough not to snap, rough enough not to slip when tying. Of course, the intensity of endurance is within a certain amount.
